home.title: Dobrodošli u price|manager
home.description: Ovo je početna stranica. Ovdje su neki prečaci do stranica s popisima:

groups.title: Grupe
groups.deleteConfirm: Jeste li sigurni da želite izbrisati {{count}} odabranih grupa?

appPermissions.title: App Permissions
appPermissions.dangerWarning: Editing or deleting permissions can lock users out of the application. Proceed only if you have a superuser available and understand the impact.
appPermissions.deleteWarning: Deleting this permission can break application access. Continue?
appPermissions.deleteSelectedWarning: Deleting {{count}} permission(s) can break application access. Continue?

appRoles.title: App Roles
appRoles.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} selected app roles?

serviceInitialization.title: Inicijalizacija usluge
serviceInitialization.description: Ručno inicijalizirajte podatke usluge. Odaberite podatke koje želite učitati i kliknite gumb Učitaj podatke.
serviceInitialization.essentialDataDescription: Osnovni podaci potrebni za rad usluge (jezici, valute, zemlje, jedinice, porezni razredi, dopuštenja, uloge)
serviceInitialization.sampleDataDescription: Ogledni podaci za testiranje i demonstraciju (organizacije, grupe, kanali, reci cijena)
serviceInitialization.refreshPermissionsHint: Ponovno učitajte svoja dopuštenja nakon učitavanja novih podataka
